title: OA & Deadline Mission Agent
description: Surface OA/take-home and offer deadlines as high-priority Today missions.

userStories.title: OA deadline extraction from email events
userStories.description: When email classifier sets status OA, parse deadline from email_events metadata and PATCH application.deadline.
userStories.notes: deadline_parser.py + email service hook, 4 pytest tests pass.

userStories.title: Brief oa_deadlines section and mission scorer
userStories.description: Add oa_deadlines section to morning brief for apps with deadline within 7 days. mission_scorer ranks above high_matches.
userStories.notes: brief_oa_deadlines.py + mission_scorer 850 base, 8 pytest tests pass.

userStories.title: Today UI for deadline missions
userStories.description: Mission cards show deadline badge (Due in X days / Overdue).
userStories.notes: MissionCard DeadlineBadge + 7 vitest tests, build green.

userStories.title: Integration tests and docs
userStories.description: Test deadline apps in GET /api/brief/today missions. Update docs/AGENTIC_FEATURES.md.
userStories.notes: test_brief_router OA mission test + AGENTIC_FEATURES.md updated.
